purpose: Map older Blender learning-source language to current Blender/workbench concepts before turning a lesson into a scout, target panel, or issue.

manual_links.label: Blender Manual latest
manual_links.note: Use for current UI and concept naming.

manual_links.label: Blender Manual 4.5 LTS
manual_links.note: Useful stable version anchor near current LTS behavior.

entries.old_term_or_workflow: Classroom-era Append/Link, library data, and broad UI walkthrough steps.
entries.modern_concept: Current Blender asset/library linking and reusable scene fixtures.
entries.prefer_workbench: Use a future fixture/reference-scene library path from issue #29 rather than copying old UI steps directly.
entries.version_notes: Treat broad classroom exercises as artistic/structural prompts; verify any UI panel names against the current manual before implementation.

entries.old_term_or_workflow: Older lamp, area-light, and mesh-light tutorial language.
entries.modern_concept: Current light objects, emissive mesh materials, and explicit same-view lighting sweeps.
entries.prefer_workbench: Prefer blender_workbench.recipes.mesh_light and examples/mesh_light_scout.py for controlled current-version comparisons.
entries.version_notes: Do not chase legacy lamp panel names; preserve the lighting setup idea and rebuild it through current object/material APIs.

entries.old_term_or_workflow: Older texture, environment, and lighting recipes tied to dated UI panels and node names.
entries.modern_concept: Current procedural texture/material nodes, environment mood construction, and explicit texture/light axes.
entries.prefer_workbench: Use examples/light_texture_scout.py and examples/terrain_environment_scout.py; add new procedural texture-node scouts through issue #22.
entries.version_notes: Translate the visual axis first: texture magnitude, scale, environment haze, and light mood are more durable than the old click path.

entries.old_term_or_workflow: CG lighting lessons framed around older Blender render/UI behavior.
entries.modern_concept: Current Cycles/Workbench/EEVEE lighting comparisons with fixed cameras, explicit failure anchors, and selected-render promotion.
entries.prefer_workbench: Prefer gobo, mesh-light, camera-perspective, and soft-atmosphere scouts before copying legacy renderer settings.
entries.version_notes: Keep the lighting/composition principle, then re-express it as a small parameter sweep using current render profiles.

entries.old_term_or_workflow: Legacy compositor/glow/pass recipes and finishing-look UI steps.
entries.modern_concept: Current postprocess helper sweeps, render-pass diagnostics, and selected raw-image reuse.
entries.prefer_workbench: Prefer blender_workbench.postprocess, examples/postprocess_look_scout.py, and future render-pass diagnostics from issue #21.
entries.version_notes: Preserve the intended finish (bloom, contrast, warmth, pass diagnosis) rather than old node layout or button names.

entries.old_term_or_workflow: General artist/process inspiration that is less tied to exact Blender controls.
entries.modern_concept: Style prompts, composition constraints, and reference-attempt notes for current scouts.
entries.prefer_workbench: Use as concept language or target-panel guidance; only translate UI details after a concrete page range is triaged.
entries.version_notes: Art-direction observations can often survive unchanged; implementation mechanics still need current-manual checks.
